title: Thai Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful Thai-inspired stir fry made with silky tofu, fresh herbs, and your choice of protein.

ingredients.name: Silky tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the protein and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced vegetables and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Thai basil and chilies and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the silky tofu and cook until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional Thai basil if desired.
